name: skitterspec-monorepo
description: skitterspec workspaces — the base spec-driven workflow plus swappable ticketing-provider packages.
author: Reuben Greaves

scripts.version: node node_modules/@skitterbyte/skittership/assets/scripts/generate-changelog.js && node node_modules/@skitterbyte/skittership/assets/scripts/generate-releases.js && git add CHANGELOG.md RELEASES.md
